hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASPs prepare structured, auditable Travel Rule records across jurisdictions by connecting provider data, regulatory rules, case management, and evidence preservation.

trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk

problem_title: Travel Rule evidence remains hard to audit
problem_description: Compliance teams face challenges in producing coherent audit trails for Travel Rule events due to dispersed data across multiple providers and systems. This fragmentation complicates FATF-related reviews, delaying reporting readiness and increasing manual workload during audits.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, provider data, case activities and regulatory rule monitoring into one structured workflow that delivers audit-ready evidence for FATF-focused compliance teams.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exceptions to evidence
workflow_description: SFTY moves Travel Rule exceptions through case creation, review and evidence preservation to support audit-ready FATF compliance records and reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects Travel Rule outputs into structured cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence to support jurisdiction-specific compliance and FATF review preparation.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for FATF Travel Rule audits?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps VASP compliance teams prepare audit-ready Travel Rule cases by connecting provider data, jurisdictional rules, decision logs and evidence into one structured workflow.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage Travel Rule workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY supports Travel Rule event routing, exception handling, jurisdiction-specific policies, case creation and decision logging across workflows to meet FATF audit requirements.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves Travel Rule message history, case evidence, decision logs and regulatory rule updates to provide a traceable audit trail for FATF inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with multiple Travel Rule providers, orchestrating their outputs into a single compliance layer without disrupting existing systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule providers but connects their outputs into structured cases, policies and audit evidence for compliance teams.
final_description: Review how SFTY connects Travel Rule data, regulatory rules, cases and evidence into structured workflows for FATF audit readiness.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
